target_name: Ontario youth arrested over ISIS propaganda and firearms-solicitation case
incident_type: youth arrested for ISIS propaganda videos and inviting provision of firearms
description: RCMP said officers arrested a youth on Nov. 4, 2025 and later announced the case on Nov. 25. The youth was charged with participating in the activities of a terrorist group by editing and publicly posting ISIS propaganda videos and with inviting a person to provide firearms for the purpose of facilitating or carrying out terrorist activity.
charges: Participating in the activities of a terrorist group by editing and public posting of ISIS propaganda videos; inviting a person to provide property, namely firearms, intending that they be used to facilitate or carry out terrorist activity
court_jurisdiction: Ontario youth proceedings (specific courthouse not named in RCMP release)

target_name: Students Supporting Israel at TMU off-campus event
incident_type: forcible entry, broken glass, injury, six arrests
description: A private off-campus event organized by Students Supporting Israel at Toronto Metropolitan University was stormed by demonstrators near Bay and Elm streets. Police said protesters forced entry, damaged property and caused attendees to fear for their safety; one person was injured by broken glass. Five people were arrested initially and police later announced a sixth arrest.
charges: Baiton and Alexis: forcible entry, member of unlawful assembly, obstruct peace officer; Mugni: forcible entry, member of unlawful assembly; Wu: obstruct peace officer, assault peace officer; Kamran: obstruct peace officer; Ibrahim: forcible entry, mischief damage property under $5,000, assault, member of unlawful assembly while masked, mischief interfere with property under $5,000
court_jurisdiction: Ontario Court of Justice, 10 Armoury Street, Toronto (first five); Toronto Regional Bail Centre, 2201 Finch Avenue West, Toronto (Qabil Ibrahim)
notes: CityNews linked the event to Students Supporting Israel at TMU and reported one injury; TPS later detailed a sixth arrest.

target_name: Members of the Jewish community in the GTA (Waleed Khan case)

description: RCMP arrested Waleed Khan on terrorism charges tied to ISIS. Parallel police reporting said Khan and two other men had also been arrested for offences targeting women and members of the Jewish community, with searches yielding firearms, ammunition, and high-capacity magazines.
charges: Providing property to fund or benefit ISIS; providing social media accounts to benefit ISIS; participating in the activities of a terrorist group; making himself available to facilitate or commit a terrorism offence; facilitating terrorist activity; conspiracy to commit murder for the benefit of / in association with a terrorist group; conspiracy to commit murder
court_jurisdiction: Ontario court proceedings (specific courthouse not publicly stated in RCMP release); section 517 publication ban in place
notes: The RCMP terrorism release did not specify a Jewish target, but AP and police statements said the linked investigation involved offences targeting women and members of the Jewish community.
